token_import.prompt: Import token {token}? This replaces your current device identity.

lobby.title: My Games
lobby.no_active: No active games. Start one below!
lobby.stats_in_progress: {count, plural, one {# game} other {# games}} in progress
lobby.stats_total: {count, plural, one {# game} other {# games}} played all time

create.title: Start a new game
create.public_label: Public game — anyone on this server can join

game_room.waiting_title: Waiting for another player to join.

token_manager.title: Player Token
token_manager.description: Your token identifies your games on this device. Export it to continue on another device — no account needed.
token_manager.qr_hint: Scan on another device to import automatically
token_manager.import_label: Import a token from another device
token_manager.warning: This will replace your current token. Games on this device will no longer be visible unless you re-import the original token.
